$comment: JSON Schema validation schema for Zoho CRM contact record_snapshot objects passed to IntegrityGate.pre_validate(). Field names HUMAN VERIFICATION REQUIRED — see SECURITY_AUDIT.md.

email.description: Email address used to look up this contact

run_id.description: Run ID that produced this snapshot

snapshot_at.description: UTC ISO 8601 timestamp when this snapshot was assembled

is_stub.description: True if no CRM match was found — contact assembled from email only

contact.description: HUMAN VERIFICATION REQUIRED: CRM contact record fields

Full_Name.description: HUMAN VERIFICATION REQUIRED: may be Full_Name or First_Name+Last_Name

Account_Name.description: HUMAN VERIFICATION REQUIRED: may be string or {id, name} object

confidence.description: Contact match confidence level — LOW blocks pipeline processing
